name: Chinese Mixed Pickles
recipeInstructions:
For Pickling Liquid: Combine all ingredients in a 3-quart saucepan. Cook and stir over medium heat until the liquid boils. Remove from heat. Cool.
For Pickles:
1. Wash all vegetables.
2. Pare carrots and radish.
3. Cut cucumber lengthwise into quarters and remove seeds.
4. Cut carrots, radish, and cucumber into "matchstick" thin strips about 2 inches long.
5. Cut celery into 1/4 inch diagonal slices.
6. Remove seeds from peppers and cut peppers into 1/2 inch cubes.
7. Fill a 5-quart Dutch oven half full of water. Cover and bring to boil over medium heat.
8. Uncover the pot and add all vegetables. Turn off heat immediately.
9. Let vegetables stand uncovered for 2 minutes.
10. Drain vegetables in a large colander and spread them out on clean towels. Allow to dry for 2 to 3 hours.
11. Pack the dried vegetables firmly into clean jars with lids.
12. Pour the pickling solution into the jars until the vegetables are completely covered.
13. Cover jars tightly and store in the refrigerator for at least 1 week before using.
Makes 1-1/2 to 2 quarts.
